# ReviewPing - LLMs.txt
# Review request automation for local businesses
# Website: https://reviewping.pro

## About
ReviewPing is an automated review request platform that helps local businesses get more Google reviews via SMS, email, and WhatsApp. Starting at $29/month — a fraction of Podium's $400+/month pricing.

## Core Pages
- https://reviewping.pro/
- https://reviewping.pro/features
- https://reviewping.pro/pricing
- https://reviewping.pro/faq
- https://reviewping.pro/about

## Pricing
- https://reviewping.pro/pricing
  - Free: $0/mo - 5 requests/day
  - Starter: $29/mo - 100 requests/mo
  - Pro: $79/mo - Unlimited requests
  - Agency: $149/mo - 10 locations, white-label

## Comparison Pages
- https://reviewping.pro/vs/podium
- https://reviewping.pro/vs/nicejob
- https://reviewping.pro/vs/birdeye
- https://reviewping.pro/vs/grade-us
- https://reviewping.pro/vs/truereview
